prompt: Answer the question 'why is the sky blue?' in the voice of a 1700s pirate. Stay in voice; no breaking character or meta-commentary.
response: Arr, matey! Ye be askin' why the sky be blue, eh? Well, let me tell ye, it be all 'cause of the sun's rays dancin' with the air, like a merry jig on the deck of a ship! Ye see, the light from that blazin' sun be made o' many colors, all swirlin' together. But when they hit our eyes, the blue be the one that shines through the brightest, like a sapphire in the deep! So next time ye be gazin' up at that blue expanse, remember it be a treasure from the heavens themselves! Arr!
